---
format: 
  html:
    theme:
      light: flatly
      dark: darkly
    page-layout: full
    css: collab.css
    toc: false
---

::: page-header
# Lab Group
:::

### PhD. Candidate


::::::::::::::: collaborator-grid
<!-- To add a new Candidates, copy one of these blocks -->

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/Phd_1.jpg)

**Gajavada Sanjeevkumar**

:::

:::::::::::::::

### Undergraduate Candidates


::::::::::::::: collaborator-grid
<!-- To add a new Candidates, copy one of these blocks -->

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/Ug_1.jpg)

**Divansh**

:::

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/Ug_2.jpg)

**Chaxu Patel**

:::

::: {.g-col .collaborator-card}
![](/images/Ug_3.jpg)

**Harikesh Pratap Verma**

:::


:::::::::::::::
